verses.latin_vulgate: Non nobis, Domine, non nobis,  sed nomini tuo da gloriam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א לָ֥נוּ יְהֹוָ֗ה לֹ֫א־לָ֥נוּ כִּֽי־לְ֭שִׁמְךָ תֵּ֣ן כָּב֑וֹד עַל־חַ֝סְדְּךָ֗ עַל־אֲמִתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Not to us, O Lord, not to us; but to thy name give glory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei meille, Herra, ei meille, vaan sinun nimelles anna kunnia, sinun armos ja totuutes tähden.
verses.king_james: Not unto us, O Lord, not unto us, but unto thy name give glory, for thy mercy, and for thy truth’s sake.

verses.latin_vulgate: super misericordia tua et veritate tua ;  nequando dicant gentes :  Ubi est Deus eorum ?
verses.douay_rheims: For thy mercy, and for thy truth's sake: lest the Gentiles should say: Where is their God?
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksi pakanat sanovat: kussa on nyt heidän Jumalansa?
verses.king_james: Wherefore should the heathen say, Where is now their God?

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus autem noster in cælo ;  omnia quæcumque voluit fecit.
verses.douay_rheims: But our God is in heaven: he hath done all things whatsoever he would.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta meidän Jumalamme on taivaissa: mitä ikänä hän tahtoo, sen hän tekee.
verses.king_james: But our God is in the heavens: he hath done whatsoever he hath pleased.

verses.latin_vulgate: Simulacra gentium argentum et aurum,  opera manuum hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲֽ֭צַבֵּיהֶם כֶּ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֑ב מַ֝עֲשֵׂ֗ה יְדֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The idols of the Gentiles are silver and gold, the works of the hands of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan heidän epäjumalansa ovat hopia ja kulta, ihmisten käsillä tehdyt.
verses.king_james: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os habent, et non loquentur ;  oculos habent, et non videbunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֶּֽה־לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ עֵינַ֥יִם לָ֝הֶ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have mouths and speak not: they have eyes and see not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heillä on suu, ja ei puhu: heillä ovat silmät, ja ei näe.
verses.king_james: They have mouths, but they speak not: eyes have they, but they see not:

verses.latin_vulgate: Aures habent, et non audient ;  nares habent, et non odorabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אׇזְנַ֣יִם לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יִשְׁמָ֑עוּ אַ֥ף לָ֝הֶ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יְרִיחֽוּן׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have ears and hear not: they have noses and smell not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heillä ovat korvat, ja ei kuule: heillä ovat sieraimet, ja ei haista.
verses.king_james: They have ears, but they hear not: noses have they, but they smell not:

verses.latin_vulgate: Manus habent, et non palpabunt ;  pedes habent, et non ambulabunt ;  non clamabunt in gutture suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְדֵיהֶ֤ם ׀ וְלֹ֬א יְמִישׁ֗וּן רַ֭גְלֵיהֶם וְלֹ֣א יְהַלֵּ֑כוּ לֹא־יֶ֝הְגּ֗וּ בִּגְרוֹנָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have hands and feel not: they have feet and walk not: neither shall they cry out through their throat.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heillä ovat kädet, ja ei rupee: heillä ovat jalat, ja ei käy; ja ei puhu kurkustansa.
verses.king_james: They have hands, but they handle not: feet have they, but they walk not: neither speak they through their throat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Similes illis fiant qui faciunt ea,  et omnes qui confidunt in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּ֭מוֹהֶם יִהְי֣וּ עֹשֵׂיהֶ֑ם כֹּ֖ל אֲשֶׁר־בֹּטֵ֣חַ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let them that make them become like unto them: and all such as trust in them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka niitä tekevät, ovat niiden kaltaiset, ja kaikki, jotka heihin uskaltavat.
verses.king_james: They that make them are like unto them; so is every one that trusteth in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domus Israël speravit in Domino ;  adjutor eorum et protector eorum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל בְּטַ֣ח בַּיהֹוָ֑ה עֶזְרָ֖ם וּמָגִנָּ֣ם הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: The house of Israel hath hoped in the Lord: he is their helper and their protector.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Israel toivokaan Herran päälle: hän on heidän apunsa ja heidän kilpensä.
verses.king_james: O Israel, trust thou in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domus Aaron speravit in Domino ;  adjutor eorum et protector eorum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֣ית אַ֭הֲרֹן בִּטְח֣וּ בַיהֹוָ֑ה עֶזְרָ֖ם וּמָגִנָּ֣ם הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: The house of Aaron hath hoped in the Lord: he is their helper and their protector.
verses.finnish_biblia: Aaronin huone toivokaan Herran päälle: hän on heidän apunsa ja heidän kilpensä.
verses.king_james: O house of Aaron, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui timent Dominum speraverunt in Domino ; adjutor eorum et protector eorum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְאֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה בִּטְח֣וּ בַיהֹוָ֑ה עֶזְרָ֖ם וּמָגִנָּ֣ם הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: They that fear the Lord have hoped in the Lord: he is their helper and their protector.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka Herraa pelkäävät, toivokaan myös Herran päälle: hän on heidän apunsa ja heidän kilpensä.
verses.king_james: Ye that fear the Lord, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus memor fuit nostri,  et benedixit nobis.  Benedixit domui Israël ;  benedixit domui Aaron.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָה֮ זְכָרָ֢נוּ יְבָ֫רֵ֥ךְ יְ֭בָרֵךְ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל יְ֝בָרֵ֗ךְ אֶת־בֵּ֥ית אַהֲרֹֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord hath been mindful of us, and hath blessed us. He hath blessed the house of Israel: he hath blessed the house of Aaron.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra muistaa meitä ja siunaa meitä: hän siunaa Israelin huoneen, hän siunaa Aaronin huoneen.
verses.king_james: The Lord hath been mindful of us: he will bless us; he will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedixit omnibus qui timent Dominum,  pusillis cum majoribus.
verses.douay_rheims: He hath blessed all that fear the Lord, both little and great.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän siunaa ne, jotka Herraa pelkäävät, sekä pienet että suuret.
verses.king_james: He will bless them that fear the Lord, both small and great.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adjiciat Dominus super vos,  super vos et super filios vestros.
verses.douay_rheims: May the Lord add blessings upon you: upon you, and upon your children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra siunatkoon teitä enemmin ja enemmin, teitä ja teidän lapsianne.
verses.king_james: The Lord shall increase you more and more, you and your children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicti vos a Domino,  qui fecit cælum et terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּרוּכִ֣ים אַ֭תֶּם לַיהֹוָ֑ה עֹ֝שֵׂ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם וָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be you of the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te olette Herran siunatut, joka taivaat ja maan on tehnyt.
verses.king_james: Ye are blessed of the Lord which made heaven and earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cælum cæli Domino ;  terram autem dedit filiis hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם שָׁ֭מַיִם לַיהֹוָ֑ה וְ֝הָאָ֗רֶץ נָתַ֥ן לִבְנֵי־אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The heaven of heaven is the Lord's: but the earth he has given to the children of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Taivasten taivaat ovat Herran; mutta maan on hän ihmisten lapsille antanut.
verses.king_james: The heaven, even the heavens, are the Lord’s: but the earth hath he given to the children of men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non mortui laudabunt te, Domine,  neque omnes qui descendunt in infernum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֣א הַ֭מֵּתִים יְהַֽלְלוּ־יָ֑הּ וְ֝לֹ֗א כׇּל־יֹרְדֵ֥י דוּמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The dead shall not praise thee, O Lord: nor any of them that go down to hell.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuolleet ei taida Herraa kiittää, eikä ne, jotka menevät alas hiljaisuuteen.
verses.king_james: The dead praise not the Lord, neither any that go down into silence.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed nos qui vivimus, benedicimus Domino,  ex hoc nunc et usque in sæculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנַ֤חְנוּ ׀ נְבָ֘רֵ֤ךְ יָ֗הּ מֵעַתָּ֥ה וְעַד־עוֹלָ֗ם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But we that live bless the Lord: from this time now and for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta me kiitämme Herraa, hamasta nyt ja ijankaikkiseen, Halleluja!
verses.king_james: But we will bless the Lord from this time forth and for evermore. Praise the Lord.
